case_title: BROTHERS FOR CHANGE, INC. VS. PRINCIPAL FACILITY GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY BROTHERS FOR CHANGE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL FACILITY GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROTHERS FOR CHANGE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BROTHERS FOR CHANGE, REPRESENTED BY ERRIS EDGERLEY, CEO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL FACILITY GROUP, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROTHERS FOR CHANGE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL FACILITY GROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-27-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL FACILITY GROUP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROTHERS FOR CHANGE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCIPAL FACILITY GROUP, INC. $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,445.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
